patterns.title: Create account modal
patterns.description: Done. The thumbnail now uses fit: "inside" which scales the image down to fit within 800x800 without cropping -- it keeps the full image and its original aspect ratio. Combined with object-contain on the card, you'll see the entire screenshot with the dominant color filling the remaining space.

patterns.title: Connect Onboarding Flow
patterns.description: Multi-step onboarding for Stripe Connect accounts with identity verification, business details, and bank account setup.
